criteria.clause: A smoke test loads the app
criteria.assertion: test.beforeEach navigates page to baseURL '/query' via a real Playwright browser context launched against the Vite dev server (webServer config); test fails immediately if the page fails to load (Playwright's default navigation timeout).

page.route() intercepts POST /query, GET /graph*, GET /files, GET /admin before navigation, fulfilling each with a fixture JSON matching the disclosed wire contracts in QueryView.tsx/GraphView.tsx/FilesAdminView.tsx; asserted implicitly by every subsequent UI assertion depending on those mocked responses resolving successfully (status/success states, not error states).

Test fills #query-input with a sample query string and clicks the submit button within [data-testid="query-form"]; test asserts the mocked POST /query request was actually received (route handler records a flag / count) before proceeding.
Test clicks the 'Graph' nav link (or navigates via page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Graph' })), fills [data-testid="graph-path-input"], submits [data-testid="graph-form"].
Test clicks the 'Files' nav link (page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Files' })).

page.on('console', msg => { if (msg.type() === 'error') consoleErrors.push(...) }) and page.on('pageerror', err => pageErrors.push(...)) registered before first navigation; test.afterEach (or end of test) asserts expect(consoleErrors).toEqual([]) and expect(pageErrors).toEqual([]).

out_of_scope_explicitly_noted: CI workflow wiring for test:e2e (no CI config file in this repo's impacted modules for this subtask)
Testing against a real running Go backend (no /graph, /files, /admin handlers exist yet in api/)
